name: netnewswire-mcp
description: Interact with your NetNewsWire RSS feeds from Claude — summarize articles, manage subscriptions, and stay on top of your reading.
long_description: An MCP server that connects Claude to NetNewsWire via AppleScript on macOS. Browse feeds, fetch and search articles, mark as read/starred, and subscribe to new feeds. Perfect for daily article summaries and feed management workflows.

tools.name: list_feeds
tools.description: List all subscribed feeds and folders, optionally filtered by account.

tools.name: get_articles
tools.description: Fetch articles with filters: unread, starred, by feed, or recent.

tools.name: read_article
tools.description: Get the full content of a specific article by ID.

tools.name: mark_articles
tools.description: Mark articles as read/unread or starred/unstarred.

tools.name: subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe to a new RSS feed by URL.

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search articles by keyword across all feeds.
